temp-range-exploration

Erica Griffin

2026-03-02

average max: hatch to day 4

ggplot(nestling_df,
       aes(x = avg_max_hatch_4,
           y = nestling_fate_bin)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05,
              width = 0,
              size = 2,
              alpha = 0.4,
              color = "pink") +
  stat_smooth(method = "glm",
              method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
              color = "deeppink",
              fill = "pink",
              size = 1.5,
              se = TRUE) +
  xlab("Average Max Temp (Hatch–4)") +
  ylab("Probability of Fledging") +
  theme_bw()
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## Warning: Removed 3982 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Warning: Removed 3982 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

average max: day 5 to day 12

ggplot(nestling_df,
       aes(x = avg_max_5_12,
           y = nestling_fate_bin)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05,
              width = 0,
              size = 2,
              alpha = 0.4,
              color = "pink") +
  stat_smooth(method = "glm",
              method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
              color = "deeppink",
              fill = "pink",
              size = 1.5,
              se = TRUE) +
  xlab("Average Max Temp (day 5 - 12)") +
  ylab("Probability of Fledging") +
  theme_bw()

average max: day 13 and beyond

ggplot(nestling_df,
       aes(x = avg_max_13_plus,
           y = nestling_fate_bin)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05,
              width = 0,
              size = 2,
              alpha = 0.4,
              color = "pink") +
  stat_smooth(method = "glm",
              method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
              color = "deeppink",
              fill = "pink",
              size = 1.5,
              se = TRUE) +
  xlab("Average Max Temp (day 13 and beyond)") +
  ylab("Probability of Fledging") +
  theme_bw()

lowest 2 day max: hatch to day 4

ggplot(nestling_df,
       aes(x = coldest_hatch_4,
           y = nestling_fate_bin)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05,
              width = 0,
              size = 2,
              alpha = 0.4,
              color = "pink") +
  stat_smooth(method = "glm",
              method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
              color = "deeppink",
              fill = "pink",
              size = 1.5,
              se = TRUE) +
  xlab("Coldest 2-day Max Temp (Hatch–4)") +
  ylab("Probability of Fledging") +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## Warning: Removed 3982 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).

lowest 2 day max: day 5 to day 12

ggplot(nestling_df,
       aes(x = coldest_5_12,
           y = nestling_fate_bin)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05,
              width = 0,
              size = 2,
              alpha = 0.4,
              color = "pink") +
  stat_smooth(method = "glm",
              method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
              color = "deeppink",
              fill = "pink",
              size = 1.5,
              se = TRUE) +
  xlab("Coldest 2-day Max Temp (day 5–12)") +
  ylab("Probability of Fledging") +
  theme_bw()
